We have not been maintaining this blog for a while. I would now like to renew it by telling a story. The story of an unsung hero that you simply need to know about. The story of a person who never got the credit he deserves, which I will now change. 
 
It is the story of my brother Raban, who wrote most of the previous articles for this blog. Raban has told you about our long and troublesome journey from Parges to The Nation, about how we had to live in a refugee camp for an inhumanely long time under terrible conditions, and about why we had to leave our beloved home town. You, my dear readers, have in a way, been on this journey with us. But he has never told you about the fact that he lost his ability to walk during the terrible events in Parges. He has not told you about why he made this sacrifice, and what a true hero he really is. 
 
Raban is not a man who likes to share his personal stories, but I have decided that it is time. Especially if you are a reader from our home country Parges, you ought to know this about my brother.
 
The incident that finally forced us to leave Parges was a tragedy, especially in the eyes of my brother. Prava Secondary, the school that Raban was teaching at, and had in fact, helped to build with his own two hands, was bombed to the ground. A place of learning, a place of safety, a place that Raban had always offered the Pargesian children the opportunity of a good education, was nothing more than smoldering rubble. During the bombings, most of the children from Raban's 6th grade class had been trapped in the school garden shed, as they had not been able to make it to the safety of the library, which they had been using as a bomb shelter. 
 
Against what everyone told him to do, <link="data_raban_savedchildren"><color=#464646>Raban ran out to the shed and saved these children from certain death in this hellish attack.</color></link> He did not rest until every one of them was safe in the library. Without his brave escort, they would not have made it to the shelter, where they were able to wait in safety until the bombing was finally over. The shed was destroyed only minutes later. But Raban himself - he had not made it safely back before the bombs dropped. He was buried under rubble for almost a day, clinging to his bare life, until we finally discovered him. But he had paid a high price: His ability to walk.
 
I can not tell you how much I admire my brother for so much bravery, and although I know that he would never have permitted me to write this article, I have decided that you, dear readers, simply needed to know about this.

Hey lovely man, how are you today? :)
 
[Raban]
Hey :) Not so good.
 
[You]
What happened?
 
[Raban]
I stood in the lunch line for one and a half hours and then there was nothing but bread left. You know I am not at all fussy with food, but after not having any lunch for the last two days, it stresses me out. The guy at the food handout told me to fuck off if I didn't like it.
 
[You]
Oh my god, I have no idea how you stay so calm! It makes me furious even hearing about it!! I would have exploded a long time ago. If the guy at the office canteen talked to me like that, I'd get him fired
 
[Raban]
You know you can't compare this place to an office canteen.
 
[You]
I know, it's just... How is it even legal to treat people like that?!
 
[Raban]
Calm down, love. I don't mind people being assholes, they're just stressed out themselves. What really bugs me is that nobody really gives a shit about anyone here. Everyone is just trying to get by without being hungry or tired day by day.
 
[You]
Hang in there, darling! Never forget, you're a real hero. To the others... and to me :)
 
[Raban]
I love how you always want to help me. But please stop saying that, it makes me uncomfortable.
 
[You]
You are far too modest. You should be proud of what you've done! Anyway, not much longer now! I can't wait :)

Plus I think it'll make for some really nice, serene photos :)

Yes. I love you, too.

Then let's do it! :)

So let's get something abundantly clear to begin with: I feel bad. I feel like a fucking moron - and rightly so. <link="data_harrison_bombingsexcuse"><color=#575756>In last week's NO article I blabbered about how some bombs would soon go off in Bonton or Farview, at that time just to advertise my point of view. I am truly sorry for everyone involved or affected by those terrible events. It never was my intention to ridicule or trivialize the attacks in Bonton.</color></link> Well, if you've not been living under a rock (and a massive boulder at that) for the last couple of days, you absolutely must have heard that is pretty much EXACTLY what went down. It's far beyond "I hate to say it, but I told you so."
 
Thanks to the efforts of our government and the Safety Bill, the latest attempt has now been prevented. Finally! A kick in the terrorists' butts. Naturally, there are still tons of critical questions: How the hell is this possible to begin with when we have all the CCTV and new safety regulations out there? Why spend so much money for mechanisms that don't protect lives as they should? Why is there still no real suspect in sight, not even to mention in custody?
 
These questions neglect one fact, though: People killing asswipes are among us. They are our neighbors. They are like you. They are like me (mind you, they are most certainly NOT like me). It's tough for cameras or other automated safety systems to recognize a criminal or terrorist before he actually commits a crime. They cannot look into houses, and certainly (thankfully) cannot look into the soul of a passer-by.
 
<link="data_harrison_callspeople"><color=#575756>We the People of our great Nation must grow ever more vigilant. We ourselves must stand up for our safety, alongside of high-tech security mechanisms, as those can only work in addition to our own perception.</color></link> Let's not get intimidated and not back down to some shitheads thinking they can spoil our way of life. Report suspicious things going on as soon as you learn about them. It's your duty to the community, but mostly yourself. Loose lips can also sink terrorist ships - figuratively speaking.

We know him as this handsome man, waving politely at the press every time the cameras start rolling. He likes spreading pictures of himself helping children, or shooting "dangerous" animals. But behind this FACADE of the public servant, the hero, the formidable presenter, lies a DARK TRUTH that has never been revealed. Until now.
 
Kassart does not win elections, he buys them. He controls the democratic process by purchasing media power, publishing fake stories about his opponents, and then eventually silencing them with threats, or a payout. With the opponent out for the count, who cares if the vote count is FABRICATED?
 
Kassart does not send ancillary troops to the areas of conflict in Parges. He does not send food or medication. He sends soldiers, and bombs. Instead of solving conflicts, HE CAUSES THEM. The media won't report on his actions, neither in Parges or The Nation.
 
He owns the media, and he owns the legal system. He has to! His family has been proven to be involved in an international crime network, one that sports a list of offenses that include drug trafficking, prostitution rings, and money laundering. Not to mention that his pocketbook also powers a slew of influential lobbyists that can ensure that Kassart is never portrayed in a negative light. Forget about solving THE MOST destabilizing CONFLICT that our beautiful country has ever faced! Instead, Kassart sits on his fat ass in his mansion, playing virtual golf.
 
Knowing the truth about Kassart and his endless chain of HYPOCRACY AND LIES, I have to wonder why he feels to threatened by free thinkers and independent media like TPV? Perhaps it is because we cannot be bought? He screams that we need to "stick to the facts", but the truth is being called a liar by a FRAUD like Kassart, is about as offensive as being called smelly by a pig sitting in his own shit.
 
Actually, that's a good way to describe Kassart - a pig sitting in a big pile of his own BULLSHIT. He's no leader. He's a criminal. Corruption, greed, and a huge amount of dangerously consolidated power has caused Parges to go down the drain and this NARCISSISTIC BASTARD is to blame for it.

My dear followers. Yes. This is exactly what you think it is. I found Oleg Bakay.
 
What you see before you is an image obtained from a surveillance camera feed from the ruins of my old school, showing him among soldiers of THE NATION. These highly trained professionals COWARDLY SHOT him, a soldier in service of the Pargesian army, while he was HIDING AWAY FROM THEM.
 
Now, as shocking as that image may be to you, the HEINOUS nature of the National government is laid bare before you. Through their propaganda machine called The National Beholder they dared to make their false allegations against me and The People’s Voice as a whole, they claimed I’d be responsible for Bakay’s disappearance – when it was THEM all along!
 
But, why would they murder a fellow soldier when President Kassart and Prime Minister Blaine are such close friends, you might ask. Oleg Bakay was the person responsible for the attack on Prava Secondary, the school I have been principal of a long time ago – and they knew it. They knew the moment he’d turn up dead, everyone would blame me. They took a life, only to shut me up once and for all.
 
BUT THE PEOPLE’S VOICE CANNOT BE SILENCED!
 
So, what is there to do for you, my dear followers, against the OPPRESSIVE FORCE of the National government and the Kassart regime? Do not listen to their corrupt and manipulative media outlets! Do not fail to remind Kassart what has transpired here today! Do not let them sweep this under the carpet, to pass the buck, to influence you with such outrageously false information, to take a life to manipulate your thoughts! Or you may be next! STAND UP FOR YOUR RIGHTS AND RESIST KASSART! RESIST BLAINE! LET’S RETAKE OUR COUNTRY FROM PRESIDENT PUPPET!

We finally made it! The glorious Nation, where we were hoping to be able to live a normal life, away from the fear and danger that our home country is now plagued with. Unfortunately, what we found upon arrival in The Nation does not seem to be a lot better.
 
<link="data_raban_camp"><color=#464646>We were assigned to the Outer Bonton Reception Camp</color></link>, as a "temporary" solution. They do not seem to know what to do with us, and the camp is incredibly crowded. The most hilarious thing about this is that <link="website_beholder_encampments"><#F0966E>the media of The Nation is telling its citizens a completely different story.</color></link> They write about how openly we are welcomed, how we finally have a safe haven with free food, accommodation and friendly people.
 
Reality is the complete opposite. Now don't get me wrong, I am more than thankful for being able to escape the terrible threat of war in our country. But the situation in this camp is simply dehumanizing. We are being denied basic human rights! Food and bathrooms are rare and fights over both are common.
 
The only ray of hope is <link="data_raban_karensocialworker"><color=#464646>our social worker Karen</color></link>, who seems to be the only one around here who really cares. She does everything possible to help us, and seeing her once a week is one of the few things keeping me going right now.
 
Despite the hardships, we have sworn not to give up. We owe it to our people to make the situation here public, and also tell the people of The Nation what is really going on in these "safe havens for refugees". I have decided to use this blog to publish FACTS and facts ONLY about the war in Parges.

My dear followers, those of you who still remain. 
The story that has finally been spread by the despicable government mouthpiece… it is true. All of it. I never saved those children. Because I was too afraid. Because I ran for my life, eager of saving it before theirs. Here I now am. Alive. And they aren't.
 
I had so long forgotten about it, and now… It’s shaking me to my core. I believed that if I only tried hard enough, I could change things, that I could make things better for my people at home in Parges. I believed I could fight against the corrupt, evil, rotten politicians longing for power at the people’s expense. I believed I could free my home country from these parasites and go back home. If only I twisted words long enough.
 
We all need a reliable base on which our world is based – our truth. This was mine. But now I realize that I have been living a lie. Not only a lie that made you believe in me, but a lie that allowed me to forget who I actually was. A far too comfortable lie.
 
Only one thing is worse: Knowing that even as I speak you all continue, carry on, fight on with all your fury, perpetuating that very lie endlessly, creating new truths based on fake claims put out there ages ago. What will become of this world when everybody has their own truth? What will be real? Dependable? Everything… will be nothing.
 
Truth is dead – and I killed it that very day I was too afraid to speak up and correct a mistake. But no longer. This story has to end. On my terms.
 
There’s hardly anything more concrete than a bullet. It creates a tangible, uncomfortable fact. The very thing needed for a resurrection of truth.

If you can read this, it must mean The Office has come for me and you're my doom.
 
The worst decision I could possibly make was to sign up for Orwell. And then post about it. 'I would have to make you disappear.' Ha ha. It's so ironic, I'd have to laugh out loudly if it weren't so bitter. Two days later I get a particular mail you may have seen.
 
Sorry about the hassle with the password there. I needed to be sure you'd see what I have been doing for them, so you'd at least possibly believe me. I've been spreading hate in their name. In the name of The Nation on the one and Parges on the other. I feed their rage. And I can't get out. I dunno what she'll do to my dad if I just quit. I can't continue like this either. I don't want to.
 
That heinous bitch, Ampleford... She is the queen of lies. She might have told you she doesn't know who I am. Bah. Don't believe a word she says. She knows everything already.
 
Why she needs you then, "agent"? Didn't you figure it out already? She needs only for verification only. Everything in Orwell is mandatory to be acted upon. Everything. She isn't interested in finding out the truth at all. All she is interested in is to have her own fucked up version of the truth in Orwell, so she is allowed to do whatever she desires. What's in Orwell BECOMES the truth.
 
But this can be used against her. Hah. It's nearly too simple. All you need to do is to lie. For me.
 
<link="data_david_melissa"><color=#575756>My name is Melissa Bethany Obrian. My call sign is Ampleford.</color></link>
 
Good luck.

HILBERY - It has been a tough wait for fans of the ongoing "Grey Shadows" saga. The final act of the trilogy has already been postponed several times for a multitude of reasons, and now there seems to be yet another real threat of delay added to the list.
 
Rhubarb Productions, the studio behind "A Hundred Grey Shadows", today announced that post-production duties would be suspended until further notice. It was then reported that the suspension was due to a pending lawsuit filed by the lead actors, Mike McDeel and Betty Avonne, against the movie's director Sumishii Aran, who allegedly breached a clause in their contract. The agreement clearly stated that no images of the movie would be made public without explicit consent of both actors, which was not that case for <link="website_beholder_movie1"><#0544AC>the edited movie poster Aran had shared online</color></link> on Thursday. This has put the expected Valentines Day release in jeopardy. 
 
Fans have been taking to online message boards, sharing theories that the law suit and other hold-ups during production have been arranged to cover up the "desolate" state of the movie. As a result, the Rhubarb Productions Timelines profile has been bombarded with messages of anger with rabid fans wanting answers. In the meantime there is also news that is sure to soothe the fans' spirit: McDeel and Avonne have announced on both their websites that they have resolved their issues, and are a happy couple once more. (hh)

It didn't surprise me. Not. One. Bit.
 
You all know it, even though no one dares to speak out: <link="data_raban_blameassault"><color=#464646>The Nation, its CORRUPT leadership, and all of their deluded flock who elected them, carry the weight of the Freedom Plaza bombing victims upon their shoulders.</color></link> Their false promises of safety have finally been unmasked for what they really are: a means to put THEMSELVES in power and uphold their REIGN OF TERROR! What a farce this country is.

Here's what I say to that: as long as Blaine and Kassart remain in power, the best thing The Nation can do is what it's actually doing right now: BURNING DOWN TO THE GROUND!
